challenge_summary: All 14 findings have been resolved and incorporated into the plan revision. The 3 must-fix items (MCP tool namespace verification, IaC-agnostic azurePropertyPath, IaC selection single source of truth) are now core architectural decisions. The 6 should-fix items (state bootstrapping, npx over Docker, agent numbering, H3 subsections, dual deploy scripts, governance prereq sequencing) are integrated into their respective phases. All 5 suggestions (AVM-TF table, pitfalls section, deployment_phase variable, HCP guardrail, lock file commit) are applied.

issues.title: terraform/* MCP tool namespace assumed without verification
issues.resolution: Added Phase 0 item 8: verify MCP tool names after server installation. Agent frontmatter uses verified names with Registry API fallback.

issues.title: terraformPropertyPath mapping is undefined — governance compliance will fail
issues.resolution: Adopted IaC-agnostic azurePropertyPath in governance constraints JSON. Governance-discovery-subagent outputs neutral paths; each code generator translates to native format. New Phase 6 handles migration from bicepPropertyPath.
issues.applied_in: Phase 1 item 11, Phase 2 items 14-15, Phase 5 item 25, Phase 6 item 28

issues.title: IaC selection gate timing creates a chicken-and-egg problem
issues.resolution: Single source of truth: IaC preference captured ONCE in Requirements (iac_tool field in 01-requirements.md). Conductor reads and auto-routes. Only asks if no requirements artifact exists. Architect also made IaC-aware.

issues.title: Terraform state backend requires bootstrapping — not addressed
issues.resolution: Added Phase 2.5 to Code Generator: generates bootstrap-backend.sh/.ps1 for idempotent backend resource creation. Deploy agent Step 2 checks for backend existence and prompts bootstrap if missing.

issues.title: HashiCorp MCP Server requires Docker — devcontainer may not have Docker-in-Docker
issues.resolution: Changed to npx-based @hashicorp/terraform-mcp-server instead of Docker. No Docker-in-Docker dependency needed.

issues.title: Agent numbering collision — 05, 06, 07 used by both Bicep and Terraform
Plan assumes identical 04-implementation-plan.md structure for Terraform
issues.resolution: Terraform-specific sections documented as H3 subsections under existing H2 headings to pass artifact template validation.

issues.title: Deploy script platform assumptions — deploy.sh vs deploy.ps1
issues.resolution: Both deploy.sh and deploy.ps1 generated always for cross-platform consistency.

issues.title: governance-discovery.instructions.md applyTo update sequenced too late
issues.resolution: Moved from Phase 6 to Phase 1 item 9 as a prerequisite for Terraform agents.

issues.title: No AVM-TF module version table equivalent to Bicep's in azure-defaults
issues.resolution: Added Common AVM-TF Modules table mapping 16 resources to Terraform Registry equivalents in azure-defaults SKILL.md update.

issues.title: No Terraform-specific AVM pitfalls documentation planned
issues.resolution: Added Terraform AVM Known Pitfalls section with Set Diff Analyzer patterns, provider version gotchas, and ignore_changes lifecycle patterns.

issues.title: Phased deployment via -target is an anti-pattern in Terraform
issues.resolution: Replaced with var.deployment_phase + count conditionals. -target reserved as last-resort only.

issues.title: tf-support reference files contain HCP Terraform Cloud patterns conflicting with Azure Storage backend
issues.resolution: Added explicit HCP guardrail callout box in Phase 2 with correct Azure Storage backend template.

issues.title: .terraform.lock.hcl should be committed, not gitignored
issues.resolution: Removed from .gitignore list. Only .terraform/ is gitignored. Lock file committed per HashiCorp best practice.
